documentation_accuracy_summary: docs/README.md accurately reflects the implemented behavior. The blog-client.ts section at line 241 correctly describes the three-part error surfacing chain and the JsonExceptionFilter envelope shape. The pages-client.ts section at line 393 correctly adds the identical guarantee. Both additions are factually accurate and free of contradictions or duplications.
test_sufficiency_summary: 72 new source-contract regression specs (24 for pages-client.ts x3 assertions, 48 for blog-client.ts x3 assertions) cover every updated call site. The it.each pattern with 3 assertions per function — envelope-first read, three-part || chain regex, and envelope type annotation — reliably catches any future regression to payload?.message-only. Pre-existing 172 tests pass unchanged, confirming no success-path regressions. Overall test sufficiency is strong for this change.
